sections.paragraph:
Original: זרד

Transliteration: zered

Phonetic: zeh'-red

BDB Definition:

Zered = "osier brook"
  1. a river east of the Jordan, in the region of Moab and Edom, a source of the Arnon river

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be exuberant in growth

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
